examples: Appleby won the Greenbrier Classic by closing with a 59, making him one of only two players to hit golf's magic number in the last round.
Classic resorts like Greenbrier in West Virginia and the Inn at Little Washington in Virginia are evergreen retreats for weekends out of town.
In 2012, the Greenbrier Presidential Express will provide train service between Washington, DC and the resort.
Mr. Bush spoke to lawmakers at their annual retreat at the historic Greenbrier resort in West Virginia.
